---
title: "test_phase_88_neural_api.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_88_neural_api.test.ts"
loc: 23
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.07
style_score: 9.30
intel_score: 6.62
overall_score: 8.37
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [getTracesForFile](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database)
- [saveTrace](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database)

### Exports
- `testFile`
- `missionId`
- `traces`
- `target`
